critical_audit_matters.matter: Deferred Revenue Related to the Loyalty Program
critical_audit_matters.description: Actuarially determined based on anticipated timing of future point redemptions including breakage estimate. Changes in breakage assumption could materially change liability.

revenue_recognition.description: Revenues recognized when control of product/service transfers to customer. Management fees: percentage of gross revenues (base) and hotel profitability (incentive). Franchise fees: initial fee plus ongoing royalty as % of gross room revenues. Output method used for over-time performance obligations.
revenue_recognition.key_money_treatment: Recorded in other assets and amortized to contra revenue over expected customer life (initial term of management/franchise agreement).

depreciation_amortization.note: Declining due to asset dispositions/asset-light strategy

impairments.note: 2024 spike driven by specific property impairments. ROU assets assessed quarterly.

lease_accounting.ibr_methodology: Estimated based on currency risk, credit risk, recent debt issuances, and publicly available data

income_taxes.effective_tax_rate_note: 2024 provision higher due to real estate sale gains
income_taxes.loyalty_program_tax_matter: IRS asserting loyalty program contributions are taxable income. Tax Court ruled $12M net taxable income for 2009-2011. Company appealed. If upheld, estimated tax for 2012-2024 is $280M including $46M interest.

loyalty_program.methodology: Actuarially determined based on anticipated timing of future point redemptions including breakage estimate
loyalty_program.independent_audit: Annual audit by independent accounting firm

variable_interest_entities.note: VIE model used for consolidation where applicable. Specific VIE disclosures in financial statements.

subsequent_events.form_8k_march_2025: Issuance of $500M 5.050% Senior Notes due 2028; Playa Hotels tender offer

related_party_transactions.note: Hyatt Corporation provides Mandatory Services to franchisees. Rosemont provides optional purchasing. World of Hyatt loyalty program administered by Hyatt Corporation. 2024 supplier rebates from franchisee purchases: $7,917 (offset against System Services Costs).

advertising_fund_accounting.note: Commercial Services Fee (3.5% GRR) covers brand-wide marketing. No periodic accounting provided. Franchisor may spend more or less than collected in any year but will use all funds for Commercial Services.
